profile.name: AF Gruppen ASA
profile.about: AF Gruppen ASA is one of Norway's leading contracting and industrial groups, founded in 1985 by Per Ove Aftreth and Leif Jørgen Moger as Arbeidsfellesskapet (AF). The company is headquartered in Oslo and listed on Oslo Børs. AF Gruppen provides services across civil engineering, building construction, property development, offshore decommissioning, and environmental services. Key project areas include roads, railways, ports, energy infrastructure, residential and commercial buildings, demolition, and offshore decommissioning. The company has approximately 5,800 employees and generates around NOK 30B in annual revenue. CEO since August 2020 is Amund Tøftum. In April 2026 the company agreed to acquire Claxton Engineering Services to strengthen its offshore decommissioning and offshore wind capabilities.

people.name: Amund Tøftum
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: CEO since August 24, 2020. Previously EVP Offshore at AF Gruppen since 2016. Background in ABB and PwC.

keyFacts.label: Acquisition (2026)
keyFacts.value: Claxton Engineering Services — offshore decommissioning & wind
